title: neottianthe calcicola
intro: Neottianthe calcicola, also known as the summer male orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat various health issues such as digestive problems and fever. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which may help to soothe digestive issues and prevent infections. Neottianthe calcicola can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
